ambiguities.description: What entities, relationships, and boundaries define this system?
How do users and processes interact with the system over time?
What rules, constraints, and compliance requirements apply?
What external systems, integrations, and deployment constraints exist?
What defines MVP, done, and out-of-scope for this construction?
Charter and role definition (what the agent is authorized to do)
Allowed tools and APIs the agent may invoke
Authority boundaries (what the agent can decide vs escalate)
Memory and knowledge sources (context window, RAG, long-term memory)
Escalation paths (when and how the agent hands off to humans)
Human approval requirements for external execution or communication
Safety constraints (content filtering, rate limits, sandboxing)
Audit and logging requirements for agent actions
Evaluation criteria (how to know the agent is performing correctly)

questions.question: What does success look like for this system?
Who are the primary users and what is the organization size?
What is the timeline and what constraints (budget, compliance, team) apply?
What is the agent's charter? What is it allowed and not allowed to do?
What tools or APIs can the agent invoke?
What decisions require human approval before execution?
What is the review posture (pre-approval, post-review, no review)?
How does the agent access knowledge and context?

assumptions.assumption: The agent operates within a defined sandbox and cannot act outside its charter
Human approval is required for external-facing actions by default

suggested_closures.decision: Agent construction will start with a strict charter and pre-approval model, relaxing only after evaluation proves safety.
suggested_closures.rationale: Agents with external authority are high-risk; conservative starting posture prevents harm.

seed_tasks.title: Define system scope and success criteria
seed_tasks.transformation: Document what the system must do, for whom, and what success looks like.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: A written scope document exists and has been reviewed.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A third party can understand the scope without asking clarifying questions.

seed_tasks.title: Identify constraints and non-goals
seed_tasks.transformation: Explicitly list budget, timeline, compliance, and out-of-scope items.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No hidden constraints remain that would invalidate the construction plan.

seed_tasks.title: Define agent charter and authority boundaries
seed_tasks.transformation: Document what the agent can and cannot do, and who can change the charter.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Charter document exists with explicit boundaries.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: A reader can determine whether any proposed action is within charter.

seed_tasks.title: Inventory allowed tools and APIs
seed_tasks.transformation: List all tools the agent may invoke, their auth, and failure modes.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Tool inventory with auth and failure modes exists.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: No tool is available to the agent that is not in the inventory.

seed_tasks.title: Define human approval and escalation matrix
seed_tasks.transformation: Document which actions need approval, who can approve, and escalation rules.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every action has a defined approval requirement.

residuals.description: System scope and success criteria are not yet defined by the principal.
Constraints, compliance requirements, and non-goals have not been documented.
Agent charter and authority boundaries are undefined.
Allowed tools and APIs are not inventoried.
Human approval requirements are not defined.
